visual_description: A man in a dark suit and striped tie walks forward through a dimly lit, green-hued corridor. The camera follows him as he moves past a wall with framed pictures. He is then joined by a group of four other men, and they all stand together in a line, facing forward with serious expressions.
audio_description: A low, ominous musical score plays in the background, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
